title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Naukri Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Naukri Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Naukri Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Patna-based team.

About Naukri Digital Technologies:
Naukri Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri Digital Technologies!
